---
title: "The Letters from Dorothy Osborne to Sir William Temple, 1682-54 ed. E. A. Parry"
---

## The Letters from Dorothy Osborne to Sir William Temple, 1682-54 ed. E. A. Parry

**Author:** Dorothy Osborne
**Date:** 1888
**Imprint:** London: Griffith and Farran

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
